FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Mine Collapse
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A tunnel has collapsed deep in the mines. Workers are trapped beneath tons of rock, and the settlement holds its breath.
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.optionDescription: A mine shaft has collapsed, trapping workers underground. Time is running out. What are your orders?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Mount a rescue operation. Dig them out, whatever it takes.
Seal the collapsed section and redirect mining operations.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Miners Rescued
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: After hours of desperate digging, the trapped miners are pulled to safety. The settlement erupts in cheers. Their loyalty to the empire is unshakable.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Rescue Failed
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The rescue attempt triggered a second collapse. More workers were lost. The settlement mourns its dead and questions the empire's competence.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Section Sealed
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The collapsed tunnels have been sealed off and operations rerouted. Production will be reduced while new shafts are dug. The trapped workers are mourned in silence.
